query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  name, 
  portfolioType,
  investmentAmount,
  createdAt
FROM savedPortfolios 
WHERE userId = 1 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT 
  id, 
  name, 
  portfolioType,
  investmentAmount,
  createdAt
FROM savedPortfolios 
WHERE userId = 1 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
